texto: The Murder Burger is served right here.You need not wait at the gate of Heaven for unleavened death. You can be a goner on this very corner. Mayonnaise, onions, dominance of flesh. If you wish to eat it you must feed it. Yall come back soon." -- You bet.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Stan Rice sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The Murder Burger is served right here.You need not wait at the gate of Heaven for unleavened dea…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, vampire, murder, útil em momentos de luto e reflexao.

frase_original: The Murder Burger is served right here.You need not wait at the gate of Heaven for unleavened death. You can be a goner on this very corner. Mayonnaise, onions, dominance of flesh. If you wish to eat it you must feed it. Yall come back soon." -- You bet.
